# orm-admin-submit-org-invite-code

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

Execute the submitOrgInviteCode mutation

## Usage

```typescript
db.mutation.submitOrgInviteCode({ input: '<value>' }).execute()
```

## Examples

### Run submitOrgInviteCode

```typescript
const result = await db.mutation.submitOrgInviteCode({ input: '<value>' }).execute();
```
